{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = The Open Eye
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Open Eye]] is a silver medallion worn by members of a crowd.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Open Eye]] is not a [[Guild crest]] and stands for the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
